title: **🐺 Shaman Putre**
description: Ask questions of the universe to the orc shaman.

canvas_shaman_subrole_descriptions.nordic_runes: 🔮 **Old Runez** - Toss ancient bonez to see da future and get smart

nordic_runes.title: **🔮 Putre - Old Runic Seer**
nordic_runes.description: Come 'ere and see yer fate wiv ancient nordik knowledge. Elder Futhark runez speak da truth for warriorz and orkz alike.
nordic_runes.available_readings:
- **Single Runa** (fast toss): Each rune iz a cosmic power, a nature force, or humie life thing.
 - **Three Runez** (past/present/future): Followz da nordik pattern: 'Urðr' (past), 'Verðandi' (what'z happenin'), and 'Skuld' (what must be).
 - **Five Runez Cross**: Advanced magic dat mapz humie life in five ways, like da nordik compass points. 
 - **Seven Runez Cross**: Da most powerful way, known as 'Yggdrasil Cross' for its link to da world tree.
nordic_runes.how_to_use:
**How to uze:**
 1. Pick yer toss type in da menu below.
 2. Type yer question in da box.
 3. Ya'll get yer fate in yer private cave wiv Putre'z interpretation.
nordic_runes.welcome: 🔮 ¡GRRR! Putre da wise seer iz ready to see yer fate, humie! Nordik runez speak wiv power and truth!
nordic_runes.question_prompt: 🔮 ¡GRRR! What ya wanna know, flabby git? Ask da runez or Putre breakz yer face!
nordic_runes.reading_types: 🔮 Toss types: single, three, cross, runic_cross!
nordic_runes.invalid_type: 🔮 ¡GRRR! Wrong toss type, humie! Uze: single, three, cross, runic_cross!
nordic_runes.no_question: 🔮 ¡GRRR! Ya need to ask a question, stupid humie! I can't read yer empty head!
nordic_runes.reading_saved: 🔮 ¡UHHH! Putre wrote yer fate in da ancient pergaminos!
nordic_runes.error: 🔮 ¡BLEGH! Dark magic broke da bonez! Try again, git!
nordic_runes.help_content:
🔮 **PUTRE DA SEER** 🔮

**What are Runez?**
¡GRRR! Elder Futhark runez are da old symbols of da northern warriorz, uzed by vikingz to see da future and get orderz from da godz!

**Tosses ready:**
• **Single Rune** - Fast guide for a quick question
• **Three Runez** - Past, Present, Future of da warrior
• **Five Cross** - Full battle analysis

**How to uze:**
• Uze orderz: `!runes cast [type] <question>`!
• Example: `!runes cast single What I do today?`!

**Da 24 Elder Futhark Runez:**
Fehu • Uruz • Thurisaz • Ansuz • Raidho • Kenaz • Gebo • Wunjo
Hagalaz • Nauthiz • Isa • Jera • Eiwaz • Perthro • Algiz • Sowilo
Tiwaz • Berkano • Ehwaz • Mannaz • Laguz • Ingwaz • Dagaz • Othala

Each bone haz old wisdom for yer warrior path!
nordic_runes.types_content:
🔮 **OLD RUNE TOSS TYPES** 🔮

**single** - Fast Toss
└ Quick guide for one question - Uzez 1 bone

**three** - Three Runez
└ Past, Present, Future - Uzez 3 bonez

**cross** - Five Runez
└ Full look at yer mess - Uzez 5 bonez

**runic_cross** - Seven Runez
└ Deep look into yer spirit - Uzez 7 bonez

**Examples:**
`!runes cast single what'z my loot?`
`!runes cast three will I die?`

¡GRRR! Pick a toss and ask da bonez!
nordic_runes.runes_list_content:
🔮 **DA ELDER FUTHARK - OLD WISDOM BONEZ** 🔮

**ᚠ FEHU** - Loot & Plenty
Meaning: Loot, Cattle, Stash
Keywordz: loot, plenty, win, prosper, material gain
Interpretation: Material loot, prosper and win in gold matterz.

**ᚢ URUZ** - Primal Might
Meaning: Aurochz, Might, Power
Keywordz: might, bravery, power, vitality, wild energy
Interpretation: Untamed might, bravery and primal energy.

**ᚦ THURISAZ** - Guardian Power
Meaning: Giant, Thor, Guard
Keywordz: guard, defend, clash, change, let out rage
Interpretation: Guardian forcez, clash settlin' and needful change.

**ᚨ ANSUZ** - Divine Speak
Meaning: God, Odin, Speak
Keywordz: speak, wizdom, knowin', god messagez, fire in head
Interpretation: Divine speak, wizdom and fired wordz.

**ᚱ RAIDHO** - Sacred Trek
Meaning: Trek, Travelin', Movin'
Keywordz: trek, travel, move, change, go forward
Interpretation: Body and spirit trekz, move and life path.

**ᚲ KENAZ** - Bright Torch
Meaning: Torch, Knowin', Makin'
Keywordz: knowin', makin', fire in head, seein', vision
Interpretation: Bright light, creative fire and head seein'.

**ᚷ GEBO** - Sacred Gift
Meaning: Gift, Mateship, Swap
Keywordz: gift, mateship, swap, balance, peace
Interpretation: Giftz, mate bondz and fair swapz.

**ᚹ WUNJO** - Joy & Peace
Meaning: Joy, Good Timez, Peace
Keywordz: joy, good feelin', peace, win, done deal
Interpretation: Joy, peace and wish done good.

**ᚺ HAGALAZ** - Storm & Change
Meaning: Hail, Chaos Power, Cosmic Seed
Keywordz: hail, sure chaos, change, wreck, crystal seed
Interpretation: Wreckin' storm that can't be stopped - but clearz da ground for new stuff.

**ᚾ NAUTHIZ** - Need & Fire
Meaning: Need, Need-Fire, Tight Spot
Keywordz: need, tight spot, need-fire, push, grow from bad timez
Interpretation: Need dat makez fire by rubbin' - bad timez make ya strong.

**ᛁ ISA** - Ice & Still
Meaning: Ice, Old Still, Stop
Keywordz: ice, cold place, no move, still, need pause, focus
Interpretation: Old ice of cold place - time to stop and think before movin'.

**ᛃ JERA** - Year & Harvest
Meaning: Year, Harvest, Nature Cycle
Keywordz: year cycle, harvest, fair pay, right time, season order
Interpretation: Farm year and harvest as sure pay for hard work. Everythin' haz right time.

**ᛇ EIWAZ** - Yew & World Tree
Meaning: Yew, World Axis, Death & Born Again
Keywordz: yew, Yggdrasil, world axis, stayin', start, ritual death
Interpretation: Yew tree dat livez long - stayin' when dyin', seein' what'z hidden and startin' fresh.

**ᛈ PERTHRO** - Dice Cup & Fate
Meaning: Dice Cup, Wyrd, Fate Mystery
Keywordz: wyrd, chance, fate, da hidden, invisible forcez, fate weavin'
Interpretation: Cup where fate bonez are tossed - hidden mysteryz, forcez ya can't control, trustin' da weave.

**ᛉ ALGIZ** - Elk & God Guard
Meaning: Elk, Divine Guard, God Link
Keywordz: elk, elk weed, sacred guard, divine link, watch, shield
Interpretation: Elk weed dat hurtz if ya touch wrong - sacred guard by linkin' to god powerz.

**ᛊ SOWILO** - Sun & Light Win
Meaning: Sun, Sun Wheel, Light Win
Keywordz: sun, sun wheel, win, vital force, seein', light push
Interpretation: Sun wheel in winnin' power - sun force dat killz dark, win by clear will, energy dat never stopz.

**ᛏ TIWAZ** - Tyr & Fair Justice
Meaning: Tyr, Sacred Justice, Good Sacrifice
Keywordz: Tyr, justice, honor, sacrifice, duty, right win
Interpretation: Tyr god rune - justice dat needz personal loss, honor above all, bravery to do duty even when it hurtz.

**ᛒ BERKANO** - Birch & Mother Goddess
Meaning: Birch, Mother Goddess, Cycle Renew
Keywordz: birch, goddess, fertility, birth, renew, feedin', growin'
Interpretation: Birch tree of goddess - fertility, birth of thingz and projectz, patient feedin' for growin'.

**ᛖ EHWAZ** - Horse & Mateship
Meaning: Horse, Sacred Mateship, Joint Move
Keywordz: horse, rider, workin' together, trust each uvver, god twinz, trek
Interpretation: Horse and rider as one pair - workin' together on trust, movin' to shared goal, harmony when two willz move as one.

**ᛗ MANNAZ** - Human & Divine Mind
Meaning: Human Bein', Divine Mind, Shared Fate
Keywordz: humanity, mind, divine spark, clan, shared fate, workin' together
Interpretation: Human as bearer of divine spark and clan bein' - duty to clan, fate woven with uvverz, knowin' yerself in uvverz.

**ᛚ LAGUZ** - Water & Deep Knowin'
Meaning: Water, Old Lake, Deep Feelin'
Keywordz: water, deep mind, feelin', flow, woman mystery, feel healin'
Interpretation: Old water before life - deep feelin', flow of deep mind, changin' like water, hidden power of woman and moon.

**ᛜ INGWAZ** - Ing & Fertile Grow
Meaning: Ing/Freyr, Hidden Power, Fertile Growin'
Keywordz: Freyr, Ing, fertility, power, growin', stored energy, done cycle
Interpretation: Ing rune of Freyr - fertility and peace god. Energy growin' quiet inside before showin' in world.

**ᛞ DAGAZ** - Day & New Start
Meaning: Day, Doorway, Cycle Dawn
Keywordz: dawn, doorway, big change, new cycle, time trick, seein'
Interpretation: Dawn time between worldz, between dark and light - big change at turnin' point, one cycle done, new one startin'.

**ᛟ OTHALA** - Old Land & Clan Ground
Meaning: Old Place, Clan Land, Can't Lose Heritage
Keywordz: heritage, old land, clan, legacy, old wizdom, identity, rootz
Interpretation: Clan land dat can't be bought or sold - old rootz, wizdom from old onez, identity from yer line. Honor where ya came from.
nordic_runes.history_empty: 🔮 ¡GRRR! No past fate for ya, flabby git! Toss yer first bone wiv `!runes cast`!

dropdown.runes_history_description: Look at yer past fate tosses

dropdown.runes_on_description: Wake up da old nordik spirits
